cycles.name: Delete ValidationTool stub and all exclusive references

server.py import fixed to ValidateDTOTool only; ValidationTool registration removed at L355
test_all_tools.py: ValidationTool imports (L53-54), make_validation_tool factory (L172-173), call (L220), and test_validation_tool_flow test (L421-425) removed

Full test suite green; grep confirms zero ValidationTool/ValidationInput hits in mcp_server/ and tests/; pylint 10.00/10 + mypy pass on all changed files

cycles.exit_criteria: All 8 deliverables satisfied; full test suite green; grep -r 'ValidationTool|ValidationInput' mcp_server/ tests/ returns zero hits; quality gates pass on all changed files.
